hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】尽管特朗普警告称将袭击伊朗石油资源丰富的哈格岛，但比特币仍坚守 71,000 美元；【FINANCE】市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭；【CRYPTO】分析师称，伊朗战争石油冲击更有可能通过比特币价格影响比特币矿工，而不是能源成本。

items.title: Bitcoin holds $71,000 despite Trump warning of strikes on Iran's oil-rich Kharg Island
items.summary: The largest cryptocurrency is up 4.2% on the week despite Friday's reversal, with attention now turning to the Fed meeting on March 17-18 and whether oil above $100 forces a shift in rate expectations.
items.title_zh: 尽管特朗普警告称将袭击伊朗石油资源丰富的哈格岛，但比特币仍坚守 71,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 尽管周五出现逆转，但这一最大的加密货币本周仍上涨了 4.2%，目前人们的注意力转向 3 月 17 日至 18 日的美联储会议，以及油价突破 100 美元是否会迫使利率预期发生转变。

items.title: Markets' hopes for Fed interest rate cuts are rapidly fading away
items.summary: As both energy prices and inflation fears pop higher, expectations for cuts are sliding lower.
items.title_zh: 市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭
items.summary_zh: 随着能源价格和通胀担忧的加剧，削减开支的预期正在下降。

items.title: Iran war oil shock more likely to affect Bitcoin miners through BTC price than energy costs, analysts say
items.summary: Hashrate Index found that about 90% of global Bitcoin hashrate operates in electricity markets largely insulated from oil prices.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，伊朗战争石油冲击更有可能通过比特币价格影响比特币矿工，而不是能源成本
items.summary_zh: 算力指数发现，全球约 90% 的比特币算力在很大程度上不受油价影响的电力市场运行。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans
items.summary: JPMorgan's move shows that the biggest U.S. bank by assets wants to get ahead of potential turbulence involving private credit loans to software companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，按资产计算，这家美国最大的银行希望在涉及向软件公司提供私人信贷贷款的潜在动荡之前先行一步。

items.title: Court closes Custodia fight with Federal Reserve just as Fed opens master-account door
items.summary: Just days after the Federal Reserve granted a limited master account to Kraken, crypto bank Custodia's years-long court battle with the Fed concludes in a loss.
items.title_zh: 就在美联储打开主账户之门之际，法院结束了与美联储的托管纠纷
items.summary_zh: 就在美联储向 Kraken 授予有限主账户几天后，加密货币银行 Custodia 与美联储长达数年的法庭斗争以失败告终。

items.title: MoonPay introduces Ledger-secured AI crypto agents to address wallet key risks
items.summary: The feature allows users to verify and sign every transaction generated by an AI agent using a Ledger hardware device, ensuring private keys never leave the hardware signer.
items.title_zh: MoonPay 推出受 Ledger 保护的人工智能加密代理来解决钱包关键风险
items.summary_zh: 该功能允许用户使用 Ledger 硬件设备验证和签署人工智能代理生成的每笔交易，确保私钥永远不会离开硬件签名者。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Bombs Iranian Oil Hub
items.summary: President Trump threatened to “wipe out” oil infrastructure on Kharg Island if Iranian forces continued to block the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. embassy in Baghdad was hit for the second time since the war started.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国轰炸伊朗石油中心
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统威胁称，如果伊朗军队继续封锁霍尔木兹海峡，他将“摧毁”哈格岛上的石油基础设施。美国驻巴格达大使馆自战争爆发以来第二次遭到袭击。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation publishes mandate outlining its role as ‘one of many stewards’ of the network
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation mandate codifies Ethereum’s core “CROPS” principles: censorship resistance, open source, privacy and security.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会发布任务，概述其作为网络“众多管理者之一”的角色
items.summary_zh: 以太坊基金会的任务规定了以太坊的核心“CROPS”原则：抗审查、开源、隐私和安全。

items.title: The Daily: Crypto whale loses almost $50M in DeFi swap, BlackRock’s staked Ethereum ETF sees ‘very solid’ debut, and more
items.summary: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.
items.title_zh: 《每日报》：加密鲸鱼在 DeFi 互换中损失了近 5000 万美元，贝莱德质押的以太坊 ETF 首次亮相“非常稳健”等等
items.summary_zh: 以下文章改编自 The Block 的时事通讯《The Daily》，该通讯于工作日下午发布。

items.title: Unified lending-trading DeFi protocol Ammalgam launches on mainnet with strategy Vaults
items.summary: Ammalgam combines lending, borrowing, and trading into a liquidity system, providing a platform for creating unlimited trading strategies.
items.title_zh: 统一借贷交易 DeFi 协议 Ammalgam 与策略 Vaults 在主网上发布
items.summary_zh: Ammalgam 将借贷和交易结合到一个流动性系统中，为创建无限的交易策略提供了一个平台。

items.title: Dividend stocks are catching up to tech stocks on a key earnings metric at a critical time for the market
items.summary: Dividend stocks are closing the earnings growth gap with tech stocks, a reason for investors seeking safety in a volatile market to favor income opportunities.
items.title_zh: 在市场的关键时刻，股息股在一项关键盈利指标上正在追赶科技股
items.summary_zh: 股息股正在缩小与科技股的盈利增长差距，这是投资者在动荡的市场中寻求安全以青睐收入机会的原因。

items.title: Inside JPMorgan Chase's push to become the startup world’s new Silicon Valley Bank
items.summary: For JPMorgan Chase, winning the niche of startup banking from rivals is about more than just gaining deposits: It's a bet to future-proof the largest U.S. bank.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通致力于成为初创企业界的新硅谷银行
items.summary_zh: 对于摩根大通来说，从竞争对手手中赢得初创银行业务的利基市场不仅仅是获得存款：这是对美国最大银行面向未来的赌注。

items.title: Why China can withstand oil's surge past $100 more easily than other countries
items.summary: The latest Middle East tensions sheds light on how the world's three largest oil consumers have taken different approaches to energy, with global consequences.
items.title_zh: 为什么中国比其他国家更容易承受油价突破100美元的考验
items.summary_zh: 最近的中东紧张局势揭示了世界三大石油消费国如何对能源采取不同的态度，并产生了全球后果。

items.title: China says 'thorough preparations' needed as Trump-Xi meeting hangs in the balance amid Iran war
items.summary: China's top diplomat Wang Yi signaled preparations are underway for a planned meeting between the presidents of the U.S. and China.
items.title_zh: 中国表示，特习会在伊朗战争中悬而未决，需要“彻底准备”
items.summary_zh: 中国最高外交官王毅表示，中美两国元首计划会晤的准备工作正在进行中。

items.title: More US Marines and warships being moved to Middle East, reports say
items.summary: The reinforcements will come from an amphibious ready group that is usually based in Japan, an official told CBS, the BBC's US partner.
items.title_zh: 报道称，更多美国海军陆战队和军舰被调往中东
items.summary_zh: 一名官员告诉英国广播公司的美国合作伙伴哥伦比亚广播公司，增援部队将来自通常驻扎在日本的两栖部队。

items.title: Explosion at Amsterdam Jewish school 'a deliberate attack' says mayor
items.summary: Security had been increased at Jewish public institutions following an earlier incident in Rotterdam.
items.title_zh: 市长称阿姆斯特丹犹太学校爆炸是“蓄意袭击”
items.summary_zh: 继鹿特丹早些时候发生事件后，犹太公共机构加强了安全保障。

items.title: Charges dropped against Georgia teens whose teacher died during toilet paper prank
items.summary: The teacher's family had asked for charges, including one of homicide, to be dropped "to prevent a separate tragedy from occuring" over the prank turned fatal.
items.title_zh: 佐治亚州青少年的老师在卫生纸恶作剧中死亡，指控被撤销
items.summary_zh: 这位老师的家人要求撤销指控，包括一项杀人罪，“以防止发生另一起悲剧”，因为这场恶作剧导致了致命的后果。

items.title: Family of Michigan synagogue suspect killed in Lebanon airstrike, officials say
items.summary: The FBI said the suspect had large quantities of fireworks and petrol in his vehicle when it caught fire after ramming a synagogue on Thursday.
items.title_zh: 官员称，密歇根犹太教堂嫌疑人家人在黎巴嫩空袭中丧生
items.summary_zh: 联邦调查局表示，嫌疑人周四撞毁一座犹太教堂后起火，车内装有大量烟花和汽油。

items.title: Ukraine and allies fear easing Russian sanctions will prolong war
items.summary: Ukraine's president says the US decision "certainly does not help achieve peace".
items.title_zh: 乌克兰及其盟友担心放松对俄罗斯的制裁将延长战争
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统表示，美国的决定“当然无助于实现和平”。

items.title: Netanyahu Has the War He Always Wanted, but on Trump’s Terms
items.summary: Israel’s prime minister wanted regime change in Iran. But President Trump seems prepared to settle for something less.
items.title_zh: 内塔尼亚胡发动了他一直想要的战争，但按照特朗普的条件
items.summary_zh: 以色列总理希望伊朗政权更迭。但特朗普总统似乎准备接受更少的事情。

items.title: Is Latin America Ready to Abandon Cuba?
items.summary: Latin America’s left saw Cuba as its lodestar. Now leaders across the spectrum are hesitant to aid a nation in the Trump administration’s cross hairs.
items.title_zh: 拉丁美洲准备好放弃古巴了吗？
items.summary_zh: 拉丁美洲左翼将古巴视为其北极星。现在，各派领导人都在犹豫是否要援助特朗普政府瞄准的国家。

items.title: To Fight Iran’s Drones, U.S. Taps Ukraine’s Hard-Earned Knowledge
items.summary: As Iran has shown, warfare involves far more deadly projectiles than it once did. It’s a problem Ukraine has been dealing with for years.
items.title_zh: 为了对抗伊朗的无人机，美国利用乌克兰来之不易的知识
items.summary_zh: 正如伊朗所表明的那样，战争涉及的致命射弹比以前要多得多。这是乌克兰多年来一直在处理的问题。

items.title: Cuba’s History Since the Revolution, in Photos
items.summary: The Cuban government, which has so far outlasted 13 U.S. presidents, faces its gravest challenge yet. Images from The New York Times and others record nearly seven decades of political turmoil, economic crises and small moments of ordinary life.
items.title_zh: 照片中的古巴革命以来的历史
items.summary_zh: 迄今为止，古巴政府已超过 13 任美国总统，目前面临着迄今为止最严峻的挑战。 《纽约时报》和其他媒体的图片记录了近七年的政治动荡、经济危机和日常生活中的点点滴滴。

items.title: Surge in Oil Prices Shakes Pakistan’s Already Fragile Economy
items.summary: Families preparing for Eid al-Fitr and farmers ready for harvest are being squeezed in a country that gets nearly all its oil through the Persian Gulf.
items.title_zh: 油价飙升动摇了巴基斯坦本已脆弱的经济
items.summary_zh: 在这个几乎所有石油都通过波斯湾获得的国家，准备开斋节的家庭和准备收割的农民正面临着挤压。

items.title: How the War in Iran Could Help China and Change Asia
items.summary: American officials have said for years that they would prioritize the Indo-Pacific. Now they’re moving warships, missiles and air defenses out for a war in the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何帮助中国并改变亚洲
items.summary_zh: 美国官员多年来一直表示，他们将优先考虑印度-太平洋地区。现在他们正在派遣军舰、导弹和防空系统前往中东发动战争。

items.title: A huge gap between network use and token value is the most important thing happening in XRP right now
items.summary: Daily payments on XRPL surged to 2.7 million, AMM pools exploded to 27,000, and tokenized asset value jumped 35% in 30 days. XRP is down 26% this year.
items.title_zh: 网络使用和代币价值之间的巨大差距是 XRP 目前发生的最重要的事情
items.summary_zh: XRPL 的每日支付额激增至 270 万笔，AMM 池激增至 27,000 个，代币化资产价值在 30 天内跃升 35%。 XRP 今年下跌了 26%。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pi Network (PI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #45.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Pi Network (PI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 45 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Official Trump (TRUMP)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #72.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：特朗普官方 (TRUMP)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 72 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #42.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 42 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Ondo (ONDO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #60.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Ondo (ONDO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 60。

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
items.summary: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.
items.title_zh: Balyasny Asset Management 如何构建用于投资的人工智能研究引擎
items.summary_zh: 了解 Balyasny 如何使用 GPT-5.4、严格的模型评估和代理工作流程构建人工智能研究系统，以大规模转变投资分析。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: New method could increase LLM training efficiency
items.summary: By leveraging idle computing time, researchers can double the speed of model training while preserving accuracy.
items.title_zh: 新方法可以提高LLM培训效率
items.summary_zh: 通过利用空闲计算时间，研究人员可以将模型训练的速度提高一倍，同时保持准确性。

items.title: Lobster buffet: China’s tech firms feast on OpenClaw as companies race to deploy AI agents
items.summary: China-based usage of OpenClaw has already topped that of the U.S., while driving demand for Chinese lower-cost AI models.
items.title_zh: 龙虾自助餐：中国科技公司竞相部署人工智能代理，享受 OpenClaw 盛宴
items.summary_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 使用量已经超过美国，同时推动了对中国低成本人工智能模型的需求。

items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 18 日星期三 Quantocracy 最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！将日历策略结合到交易组合中 [Quantpedia] 日历策略在以下情况下通常被视为较弱：

items.title: Bitcoin can survive 72% of the world's submarine cables being cut, but a targeted attack on five hosting providers could cripple it
items.summary: A Cambridge study spanning 11 years and 68 verified cable failures found that Bitcoin's physical infrastructure is far more resilient than previously understood, with TOR adoption actually strengthening the network.
items.title_zh: 比特币可以在全球 72% 的海底电缆被切断的情况下幸存下来，但针对五家托管提供商的针对性攻击可能会使其瘫痪
items.summary_zh: 剑桥大学的一项历时 11 年、经验证的 68 次电缆故障的研究发现，比特币的物理基础设施比之前理解的更有弹性，TOR 的采用实际上增强了网络。

items.title: Bitcoin quickly drops 3.5% as fresh Iran escalation short-circuits crypto rally
items.summary: Surging to a near one-month high of $74,000, bitcoin reversed back to just above $71,000 as news of U.S. military movements in the Middle East rattled risk assets.
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗新升级导致加密货币涨势短路，比特币迅速下跌 3.5%
items.summary_zh: 由于美国在中东军事行动的消息震动了风险资产，比特币飙升至近一个月高点 74,000 美元，随后又回升至 71,000 美元上方。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation publishes new mandate defining its role, core principles
items.summary: The document comes at a point of transition for the organization, following shifts in the blockchain's technical roadmap and the resignation of a co-executive director.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会发布新任务，定义其角色和核心原则
items.summary_zh: 在区块链技术路线图发生变化以及联合执行董事辞职之后，该文件正值该组织的过渡阶段。

items.title: Circle’s USDC overtakes USDT in ‘adjusted’ volume year-to-date, Mizuho says
items.summary: USDC is the more popular option when it comes to everyday, real-world applications, the research analysts said.
items.title_zh: 瑞穗表示，今年迄今为止，Circle 的 USDC 在“调整后”交易量上超过了 USDT
items.summary_zh: 研究分析师表示，在日常实际应用中，USDC 是更受欢迎的选择。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.title_zh: 改善前沿法学硕士的教学层次
items.summary_zh: IH-Challenge 训练模型以优先考虑可信指令，改善指令层次结构、安全可操纵性以及对即时注入攻击的抵抗力。

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
items.title_zh: Descript 如何实现大规模多语言视频配音
items.summary_zh: Descript 使用 OpenAI 模型来扩展多语言视频配音，优化含义和时间的翻译，使配音的语音在不同语言中听起来都很自然。

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.

items.summary_zh: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用程序安全代理，可分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的噪音来检测、验证和修补复杂的漏洞。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.

items.title_zh: 谷歌和马萨诸塞州人工智能中心正在为联邦启动一项新的人工智能培训计划。

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.

items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.

items.summary_zh: 从早期的运动传感平台到环境监测，这位教授兼媒体艺术与科学项目的负责人将数十年的跨学科研究转化为现实世界的影响。

items.title: Improving AI models’ ability to explain their predictions

items.title: Surging oil prices could wipe out benefits from Trump's 'big beautiful bill'
items.summary: Estimates from Wall Street project that if oil prices stay elevated for too long, consumers will lose as much as they gain from the new tax law.

items.title: His Film Is Spain’s Submission to the Oscars. He’s Not Sure How Spanish It Is.

items.title: Circle overtakes BlackRock in tokenized Treasuries as market hits record $11 billion
